meta.title: Troubleshooting Guide

blocks.content: Systematic troubleshooting requires understanding your system's logs, metrics, and error patterns.

blocks.title: High CPU Usage
blocks.content: Check for runaway loops, memory pressure, and expensive database queries.

blocks.content: Test remediations in staging before rolling changes to production.
